description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, wearing a sleeveless tank top and a pair of loose-fitting jeans. The figure's arms are exposed, showing defined musculature, and he stands in a relaxed, upright posture. His jeans are belted at the waist and feature visible stitching and pockets, adding to the realism of the attire. He is wearing athletic sneakers with a textured sole, suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The head is closely cropped with short hair, and facial features are well-defined. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless tank top, jeans, and sneakers, standing upright with arms relaxed at his sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank top, facial features, and full front of jeans and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm's musculature, side profile of the face, and the side seam of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tank top, jeans with pockets, and the back of the head and sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm, side profile, and the right seam of the jeans.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless tank top and loose-fitting jeans with a belt
